creative_direction.reasoning: Zero marketing copy. The ad is a phone device mockup showing a real Airbnb booking confirmation screen, composited onto a blurred background photograph of the same cabin interior. Image-gen must produce both the photographic background AND the phone with UI content — Track A full-bake is viable since the 'text' is UI chrome, not marketing typography. Track B offered for UI fidelity edge cases.
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: Booking confirmation UI floats in front of the actual cabin it books — product IS the promise kept.

prompt_track_A_full_bake.description: Full composite: blurred cabin background + phone mockup with baked-in UI content.

nano_banana_json.scene: Photorealistic product composition: a black iPhone floats at a slight 3D tilt in the center of the frame, with its screen showing an Airbnb booking confirmation UI. Behind the phone: a softly blurred interior photograph of the same wooden cabin that appears on the phone screen.

subject.description: iPhone device (recent model, Pro-ish styling with notch/dynamic island visible, slim bezels) held upright, shown at a 5-10° tilt back
subject.screen_content: An Airbnb iOS app booking confirmation screen: status bar shows '9:41' time; below the status bar, an 'X' close icon on the left and a share icon on the right; headline 'Check-in today after 4:00 PM' in Airbnb's house sans ExtraBold in near-black; below that a large rounded-rectangle photograph of a cabin interior with mountain views (same cabin as the background); below the photo, two columns: left 'Check in / Fri, Jul 5 / 4:00 PM', right 'Checkout / Wed, Jul 10 / 11:00 AM', labeled in small sans
subject.position_in_frame: centered, phone occupies ~45% of canvas height, sits in front of blurred environment

environment.location: interior of a modern wooden cabin with large windows overlooking mountains
environment.background_elements: wood-paneled ceiling and walls visible with warm brown tones, out-of-focus cream upholstered sofa, patterned knit pillow (teal/orange), wood flooring; heavy gaussian blur / shallow-DOF effect so background reads as texture/color only, not sharp detail
environment.lighting_direction: natural daylight from large windows camera-left

camera.framing: 1:1, phone centered with ~30% negative space around

lighting.key_light: natural daylight from upper-left simulating window light
lighting.fill: warm interior bounce from wood surfaces
lighting.shadows: soft natural shadows on phone body

color_palette.role: teal knit pillow inside listing photo
warm orange accent lamp in listing photo

focal_points: 'Check-in today after 4:00 PM' headline UI text
composition.match_principle: the blurred background photograph and the sharp listing photo inside the phone screen MUST depict the same cabin space — viewer should subconsciously recognize the match

style_directives: luxury hospitality product photography (reference: Apple iPhone ads, Marriott editorial campaigns)
phone screen is crisp and legible while environment is heavily blurred
no Airbnb logo visible anywhere — UI chrome carries brand identity

text_elements_in_image.size_relative: sharp, standard iOS status bar size

text_elements_in_image.font: Airbnb house sans ExtraBold (Circular or Cereal-adjacent)
Airbnb house sans (SemiBold for labels, SemiBold smaller for values)

negative_prompt: no Airbnb logo anywhere in frame
no marketing headline over the photo
no sharp background — background MUST be heavily blurred

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: Generate blurred cabin interior + phone body with blank white screen. UI composited in post.

nano_banana_json.scene: Photorealistic: black iPhone floats at slight 3D tilt in the center of a 1:1 frame, with a blank white screen (no UI content). Behind the phone is a heavily blurred photograph of a wooden cabin interior with warm wood tones, teal pillow, orange accent lamp.

lighting.style: natural daylight from upper-left, warm interior mood

negative_prompt: no UI content on phone screen (blank white)

text_overlay_spec.notes: This Track B requires a UI render (not a typographic overlay) — composite the real Airbnb booking screen mockup onto the blank phone screen region.

elements.source: rendered Airbnb booking-confirmation UI screen from brand kit (size to match phone screen bbox, preserve perspective tilt)

assets.name: Airbnb booking confirmation UI screen
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: iOS app screen showing: status bar 9:41, X close icon top-left, share icon top-right, headline 'Check-in today after 4:00 PM' in ExtraBold sans, below a rounded-corner listing interior photo, below that two columns 'Check in Fri, Jul 5 4:00 PM' and 'Checkout Wed, Jul 10 11:00 AM' in SemiBold sans.
assets.fidelity_confidence: medium for full-bake, high for composite

patterns_exemplified: C1 product UI IS the ad
prompt_writer_training_notes: The matching-subject trick is subtle but critical: the blurred background and the sharp phone-screen photo MUST depict the same cabin space. Explicitly instruct image gen with 'MUST depict the same cabin space' — otherwise it generates unrelated backgrounds. Phone aperture f/1.4 is deliberate to produce strong background blur. No Airbnb logo — the UI itself is the brand signal (confidence move). Avoid the word 'mockup' in prompts — it triggers flat vector phone templates instead of photorealistic devices.
